Name: Magitaur
Description: This fearsome voidsent encountered at the summit of the Tower of Blood is believed to have been called into the corporeal plane via advanced Mhachi summoning techniques. It appears the architect of the Occult Crescent had forged a covenant with the being, and granted it special weapons with which to defend the tower.

Name: Blue Leafkin
Description: A variety of seedkin whose head and body are cloaked in leaves. Those that inhabit Yak T'el have taken on a luminous blue hue owing to the influence of the meteorites scattered throughout the forest. The local Mamool Ja hold the creatures to be their kind who were cursed, and go to great lengths to avoid them lest they be likewise afflicted.

Name: Wivre
Description: A ferocious and powerful scalekin native to Tural. The Mamool Ja have succeeded in their domestication, and employ the creatures as beasts of burden in daily life and living battering rams in war. Those specimens seen in Eorzea in recent years were brought across the seas by Mamool Ja mercenaries.

Name: Doppro
Description: One of the three Mamool Ja clans, the Doppro are identifiable by their distinct speckled scales. Despite being far fewer in number than the Hoobigo and Boonewa, they are by no means considered lesser in status; on the contrary, they are highly regarded for their mastery in the handling of wild beasts such as the wivre.
